description: Overall experience is good. Helps with time tracking, team management, and improving productivity. You can view screenshots of team members PC
author: Osama A.
pros: It is easy to use and helps track time accurately. It helps to evaluate the team productivity. Reports are useful and work well for remote teams.
cons: Sometimes app feels a bit slow, and user can be more user-friendly. Few features take time to understand, and pricing can feel high for small teams.

description: Support with the system (Kayal) has been incredible, and we appreciate the enhancement requests that we have put in that have been granted!
author: Lydia W.
pros: I like the layout of the platform, and the reporting it offers. It is easy to navigate and support has helped me learn functions and show what we have not utilized, to make more of the platform. Very helpful!
cons: Some of the functionality with the time syncing entries. I wish there was a way to allow members to edit after an entry is completed, or the next day after it locks, and be able to pick and choose who those people are. Just to have more customizable options!

description: The software is easy to use, the reporting is not that good. For ex. "Lookup project, see time billed" does not exist. How can a time tracking software not have a simple report showing me all the time billed to one project and by who? They constantly tell you all these convoluted steps to figure it out and they expect you to spend 10 minutes everytime you want the info. Now imagine it's the end of the month and you want to bill all your clients for time spent... Hubstaff makes it worse actually.
author: Anshu S.
pros: It accurately does additions of time and tells me who recorded what so I know what to pay. That's about it.
cons: Customer support is terribly bad. Used them 8, 9x for different things, and it was always terrible. They provide phone support if they consider you a VIP customer who spends a certain amount with them. Otherwise support is through email and their virtual-online agent which is absolutely asinine. The email agents which are ostensibly humans seem to just send you FAQ links.

review_title: Overall easy to use and accurate productivity management, but has slight glitches at times
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use, options if you forget to log time, easy to keep track of productivity, accurate measurement of items completed with ability to customize time logs if I was away from desk
cons: Signs out a lot, slight lag in uploading worktime to interface that doesn't always update in real time. Pauses sometimes without notice causing missed logged hours

description: I use Hubstaff everyday to track the time I work. I work remotely and it's easy to implement and use.
author: Cecilia L.
pros: What I like most about this product is that it's easy to implement, both from the employer from the emploee's perspective.
cons: There's nothing I don't like. Maybe that it doesn't give you totals when you export it. You only can export hours.

review_title: Most effective way to maximize margins and drive profitability.
description: Employees can now focus on real tasks instead of wasting valuable hours logging time manually.
author: Cyndi L.
pros: Manual time tracking really wasted our time and had almost guaranteed inaccurate data leaving to losses in revenue. Hubstaff brought the solution after a friend introduced me to it. I highly rank Hubstaff and recommend.
cons: Hubstaff relieved us the frustration of manual time tracking. It is doing wonders in saving us time and efforts.

review_title: Hubstaff- A GREAT System Of Resources
description: I had a great experience, I’ve used this platform for managing staff and posting jobs for remote positions.
author: Sarah M.
pros: It’s a seamless job posting site, time management system and ATS. The interface is easy to navigate and the candidates are amazing!
cons: There is not much to dislike, the platform is very straightforward. They could use more work flow options.

description: I have been using Hubstaff for the last 4 years and I like it
author: nayeli P.
pros: That it provides accurate time tracked and I get paid as it is
cons: That sometimes I might forget to start the timer

description: Exciting but extremely frustrating. The support staff, while helpful are limited in what they can actually assist with resulting in many tickets being sent to the development team and extremely lengthy delays in any kind of response, if at all.
author: Lyjelle T.
pros: The tasks add on is great for project management and keeping staff on track
cons: Auto clock in is unreliable due to mobile data reception in some buildings. A lot of the features are not working and I am still waiting on support to rectify them, including my inbox, which makes it extremely difficult for me to track my own tasks and organise my day. Notifications have been turned off several times in organisation and personal settings but everyone is still being slammed with emails. The work orders are very clunky and there are no options to duplicate for one or two days (only) rather than weekly, or monthly. The timesheets are a joke - manual tracking is inconsistent and manual entries after the shift for payroll purposes are clunky and time consuming, especially for long shifts where you need to record a meal break.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple, Effective Time Tracking for Remote Teams
description: Overall, Hubstaff is a reliable and well designed tool for time tracking and team management. It strikes a good balance between oversight and ease of use. setup is also quick and pretty straightforward.
author: Junaid E.
pros: Hubstaff is easy to use and works exactly as expected. Time tracking is simple, accurate, and runs smoothly in the background without getting in the way. It is especially great for remote teams.
cons: Some features like activity tracking and screenshots can feel a but intrusive if not managed carefully. Customisation options for reports could be better.

description: I have been using it daily for 3 years, I think it is good, not having to do this control manually, the tool simplifies the process and provides more transparency.
author: Rafael F.
pros: Allows you to accurately control working time
cons: I find the screenshot a bit invasive, it is possible to disable it, but I really don't like it.

review_title: Hubstaff efficiency and friendly user tool
description: So far, we have been using Hubstaff for more than 2years already and I can say, I didn't had any issues or discrepancies throughout these years!
author: Christian L.
pros: Friendly user and allows us to organize daily task which is very essential to us.
cons: Saving time. You'll have to wait until successfully update your generated hours.

review_title: Tool to Monitor and Increase Remote Productivity
description: Overall my experience has been great working with Hubstaff.
author: Ujjwal A.
pros: 1 - Ease of tracking the work and also getting review like the activity. 2 - It helps us in keeping track of our work and also the idle time alerts help in monitoring the work. 3 - The most important pros for me is the alert which I get if i forgot to start the timer that helps in tracking the time. 4 - Also is I track the wrong hours means in another project it is very easy to shift the time to another project with a few clicks.
cons: 1 - Sometime there is issues with the interface means for a particular functionality we have to do a lot of clicks rather than a simple navigation or shortcut. 2 - There could be privacy concerns not sure about that as the screen is recorded.

description: I do not recommend this. For me, as a user, this software used an excessive amount of processing power, and its UI not even well-thought out.
author: Juan B.
pros: It does provide with very specific features to keep record of time spent working helping with accountability.
cons: Its interface is not very appealing, with many widgets spread across sections that use too much space of the screen. Also, for some reason it made my Mac Air M2 run way slower and overheat. At the moment of installation, because of all the permissions it requires, I was alerted by the laptop's built-in security agent that many of my passwords had been stolen. That was a major red flag.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Review on Hubstaff from a small remote team
description: Hubstaff has been an easy and seamless experience. We were able to use it without issues and was able to get really good insights on our remote workforce
author: Dawn M.
pros: It has helped manage human resources of our remote organization and keep track of efficiency. Also, time tracker and screenshots were helpful in validating work and activities of members.
cons: Not yet integrated with our payout method. We have not fully used all functionalities of Hubstaff yet mainly due to cost issues. And since some features need additional payment, we are only trying to use it for our top priority needs.

review_title: Great Tool for Remote Work Management
description: Overall, my experience with Hubstaff has been really smooth and efficient. It’s made tracking time and managing productivity so much easier, especially when working with remote teams. The platform is intuitive, the reports are super detailed, and the ability to monitor activity without being invasive strikes a good balance. It’s definitely helped improve accountability and organization in my workflow
author: Micaela G.
pros: What I liked most about Hubstaff is how seamlessly it tracks time and activity without disrupting my workflow. The detailed reporting and screenshots give a clear overview of productivity, which is super helpful for both freelancers and managers.
cons: What I liked least about Hubstaff is that the desktop app can occasionally feel a bit heavy on system resources, especially when running multiple programs at once. It would be great to see performance improvements in future updates.

description: those remote or hybrid teams, offer features like time tracking, project management.
author: Marionne O.
pros: to provide transparency and control over work hours and activity without being overly intrusive, valuable insight into productivity.
cons: screenshot and idle time detection can see, lack of trust in employee unresolved glitches.

description: It great so far, I feel my self more accountable
author: Syed Jarrar Haider K.
pros: I like real-time tracking and reporting features for employees' work. Also, help in tracking time spent on client projects. The screenshots and activity levels provide a great way to ensure transparency in team performance.
cons: One downside of Hubstaff is of ideal time, we should have a feature to put on pause for schedule meeting.

description: Overall experience is good. Very user friendly.
author: Ruvie S.
pros: The productivity rate, invoicing and time management.
cons: The frequent screenshot that takes almost every three minutes.

description: It has been smoother to use, overall, compared to other time clocking companies. It is also really nice that Hubstaff has a mobile clock in app.
author: Alexis F.
pros: I believe, for me, the simplicity of this product is the most important aspect of why I like Hubstaff. It's easy to keep track of our teams time and compensation.
cons: The reporting is a bit clunky. It would be nice if it was a little easier to review each individual's time on a biweekly basis.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Good tool to track my productivity, let the company to customize the amount of management applied to employees
author: Wilmer C.
pros: Let me know how many hours I have worked
cons: I lose some minutes when I shut dow hubstaff when the program is still active

description: Excellent so far, easy to generate reports and monitor resources as well as projects simultaneously.
author: Banillah S.
pros: Time tracking & Screenshots which helps us to monitor our employees and project seamlessly.
cons: Overall hubstaff is a gem, but sometimes get crashed which affect the time tracking process.

description: Excellent. Very receptive and quick to answer questions. I don't have any issues with their customer service.
author: Lorraine S.
pros: Great product for adding contacts and turning them into leads. I love how you can track your progress for your email campaigns
cons: Too many clicks to get where you want to go. They need to shorten the number of clicks to get to the section you want to work with.

description: Overall, Hubstaff seems very user-friendly. Didn`t experience any hard time using it on first time tho.
author: Jore D.
pros: The realtime monitoring of time and rates
cons: Screenshots. Honestly most affected of this is the employee.

author: claire N.
pros: Have liked it's payroll capability which has helped in all payments operation in my company
cons: Had to integrate to other tools and requires technicality in intergation.
